title: Essential mod GUI
description: This is a Pack that adds a gui that fits the style of Essential mod
body:
![Essential_Mod GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6210ca640b35845e21c97f30edddd8322fcbbc89.png)

This is a Resource Pack That adds a Starting GUI that fits the style of the [_Essential Mod_](https://essential.gg/) (that is well know for its ability to play single player together with friends)
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nXDQantD/images/635089d8376bf41e7ed7d63326d3a3918a32ad68.png)
I made this Resource Pack because i was tired of looking at that ugly difference in the Starter GUI.

Please support me in making more projects by downloading stuff from me.
